chunks.title: The Jews Strike Their Enemies in Susa
chunks.reason: Describes the initial victory and specific deaths at the citadel.

chunks.title: Esther Requests a Second Day in Susa
chunks.reason: Contains dialogue between the king and Esther regarding the second day of battle.

chunks.title: Victory in Provinces and Establishment of Feast Days
chunks.reason: Summarizes the provincial victory and distinguishes between rural and Susa celebration days.

chunks.title: Mordecai Establishes the Feast of Purim
chunks.reason: Records Mordecai's letters establishing the annual celebration and its purpose.

chunks.title: Reason for the Name Purim and Eternal Decree
chunks.reason: Explains the origin of the name and commands the perpetual remembrance of the days.

chunks.title: Esther Confirms the Decree
chunks.reason: Describes Esther and Mordecai's second letter confirming the observance of Purim.
